info.name: General Category Feats
info.description: General Feats from Astarion’s Book of Hungers.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

description.p: General Feat (Prerequisite: Level 4+)
You gain the following benefits.
Ability Score Increase. Increase your Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution by 1, to a maximum of 20.
Powerful Recovery. When you roll a Hit Point Die to regain Hit Points, you can treat any roll of 1 or 2 as a 3.

Sanguine Feast. Once per turn when you hit a Bloodied creature that isn't a Construct or Undead with an attack roll, you can expend a Hit Point Die, roll it, and regain a number of Hit Points equal to the number rolled plus your Constitution modifier.
You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

sheet.description: When you roll a Hit Point Die to regain Hit Points, you can treat any roll of 1 or 2 as a 3.

description.p: Once per turn when you hit a Bloodied creature that isn't a Construct or Undead with an attack roll, you can expend a Hit Point Die, roll it, and regain a number of Hit Points equal to the number rolled plus your Constitution modifier.
You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

sheet.description: Once per turn when you hit a Bloodied creature that isn't a Construct or Undead with an attack roll, you can expend a Hit Point Die, roll it, and regain a number of Hit Points equal to the number rolled plus {{constitution:modifier}}.

description.p: General Feat (Prerequisite: Level 4+)
You gain the following benefits.
Ability Score Increase. Increase your Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
Far Lobber. When you use the Attack action to throw a vial or flask, you can target an object or creature you can see within 40 feet of yourself.
Long Shots. Attacking at long range doesn't impose Disadvantage on your attack rolls with Thrown weapons.

sheet.description: Attacking at long range doesn't impose Disadvantage on your attack rolls with Thrown weapons. When you use the Attack action to throw a vial or flask, you can target an object or creature you can see within 40 feet of yourself.

description.p: General Feat (Prerequisite: Level 4+)
You gain the following benefits.
Ability Score Increase. Increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20.

Arise, Fog. You always have the Fog Cloud spell prepared. You can cast it without a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it in this way again. You can also cast it using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Your spellcasting ability for the spell is the ability increased by this feat.

Grasping Mist. Whenever you cast Fog Cloud, nonmagical flames in the spell's Sphere are extinguished, and creatures other than you and your allies have their Speed reduced by 5 feet while in the spell's Sphere.
Increase your Intelligence by 1, to a maximum of 20.

sheet.description: You always have the Fog Cloud spell prepared. You can cast it without a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it in this way again. You can also cast it using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Your spellcasting ability for the spell is Intelligence. Whenever you cast Fog Cloud, nonmagical flames in the spell's Sphere are extinguished, and creatures other than you and your allies have their Speed reduced by 5 feet while in the spell's Sphere.

description.p: Increase your Wisdom by 1, to a maximum of 20.

sheet.description: You always have the Fog Cloud spell prepared. You can cast it without a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it in this way again. You can also cast it using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Your spellcasting ability for the spell is Wisdom. Whenever you cast Fog Cloud, nonmagical flames in the spell's Sphere are extinguished, and creatures other than you and your allies have their Speed reduced by 5 feet while in the spell's Sphere.

description.p: Increase your Charisma by 1, to a maximum of 20.

sheet.description: You always have the Fog Cloud spell prepared. You can cast it without a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it in this way again. You can also cast it using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Your spellcasting ability for the spell is Charisma. Whenever you cast Fog Cloud, nonmagical flames in the spell's Sphere are extinguished, and creatures other than you and your allies have their Speed reduced by 5 feet while in the spell's Sphere.

description.p: General Feat (Prerequisite: Level 4+)
You gain the following benefits.
Ability Score Increase. Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 20.

Toughened Flesh. Immediately after you take Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage, you can take a Reaction to gain Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage until the start of your next turn. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

sheet.description: Immediately after you take Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage, you can gain Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage until the start of your next turn.

description.p: General Feat (Prerequisite: Level 4+)
You gain the following benefits.
Ability Score Increase. Increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20.

Sacred Magic. You learn the Light spell and can cast it without Material components. If you already know that cantrip, you learn a different Cleric cantrip of your choice. The spell's spellcasting ability is the ability increased by this feat.
Solar Luminance. When you cast Light, you can have the light from the spell be sunlight. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

Sun's Healing. As a Bonus Action while within sunlight, you can expend one of your Hit Point Dice, roll the die, and regain a number of Hit Points equal to the roll. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

sheet.description: You can cast the Light cantrip without Material components.

description.p: Increase your Intelligence by 1, to a maximum of 20.

sheet.description: When you cast Light, you can have the light from the spell be sunlight.

description.p: Increase your Wisdom by 1, to a maximum of 20.

sheet.description: When you cast Light, you can have the light from the spell be sunlight.

description.p: Increase your Charisma by 1, to a maximum of 20.

sheet.description: When you cast Light, you can have the light from the spell be sunlight.

description.p: As a Bonus Action while within sunlight, you can expend one of your Hit Point Dice, roll the die, and regain a number of Hit Points equal to the roll. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

sheet.description: While within sunlight, you can expend one of your Hit Point Dice, roll the die, and regain a number of Hit Points equal to the roll.

description.p: General Feat (Prerequisite: Level 4+)
You gain the following benefits.
Ability Score Increase. Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 20.

Endearing Pain. Immediately after you damage a creature with a Melee weapon or an Unarmed Strike, you can take a Bonus Action to give the target the Charmed condition until the start of your next turn or until you or your allies damage it. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

sheet.description: Immediately after you damage a creature with a Melee weapon or an Unarmed Strike, you can give the target the Charmed condition until the start of your next turn or until you or your allies damage it.

description.p: General Feat (Prerequisite: Level 4+)
You gain the following benefits.
Ability Score Increase. Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 20.

Necrosis. When you make a damage roll that deals Necrotic damage, you can cause one creature taking that damage to have the Poisoned condition until the start of your next turn. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

sheet.description: When you make a damage roll that deals Necrotic damage, you can cause one creature taking that damage to have the Poisoned condition until the start of your next turn.

description.p: General Feat (Prerequisite: Level 4+)
You gain the following benefits.
Ability Score Increase. Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 20.

Radiant Strike. When you make a damage roll that deals Radiant damage, you can cause one Huge or smaller creature taking the damage to have the Prone condition. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

sheet.description: When you make a damage roll that deals Radiant damage, you can cause one Huge or smaller creature taking the damage to have the Prone condition.

description.p: General Feat (Prerequisite: Level 4+)
You gain the following benefits.
Ability Score Increase. Increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20.

Enchanting Presence. You always have the Charm Person spell prepared. You can cast it without a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it in this way again. You can also cast it using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Your spellcasting ability for the spell is the ability increased by this feat.
Inevitable Betrayal. You have Advantage on attack rolls against creatures with the Charmed condition.

sheet.description: You have Advantage on attack rolls against creatures with the Charmed condition.

description.p: Increase your Intelligence by 1, to a maximum of 20.

sheet.description: You always have the Charm Person spell prepared. You can cast it without a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it in this way again. You can also cast it using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Your spellcasting ability for the spell is Intelligence.

description.p: Increase your Intelligence by 1, to a maximum of 20.

sheet.description: You always have the Charm Person spell prepared. You can cast it without a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it in this way again. You can also cast it using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Your spellcasting ability for the spell is Wisdom.

description.p: Increase your Intelligence by 1, to a maximum of 20.

sheet.description: You always have the Charm Person spell prepared. You can cast it without a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it in this way again. You can also cast it using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Your spellcasting ability for the spell is Charisma.

description.p: General Feat (Prerequisite: Level 4+)
You gain the following benefits.
Ability Score Increase. Increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20.

Vampire Magic. Choose one level 1 spell from the Enchantment or Illusion school of magic. You always have that spell and the Spider Climb spell prepared. You can cast each of these spells without expending a spell slot, but when you cast Spider Climb this way, you must target yourself, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast each spell in this way again. You can also cast either spell using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Your spellcasting ability for the spells is the ability increased by this feat.
Increase your Intelligence by 1, to a maximum of 20.

sheet.description: Choose one level 1 spell from the Enchantment or Illusion school of magic. You always have that spell and the Spider Climb spell prepared. You can cast each of these spells without expending a spell slot, but when you cast Spider Climb this way, you must target yourself, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast each spell in this way again. You can also cast either spell using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Your spellcasting ability for the spells is Intelligence.

description.p: Increase your Wisdom by 1, to a maximum of 20.

sheet.description: Choose one level 1 spell from the Enchantment or Illusion school of magic. You always have that spell and the Spider Climb spell prepared. You can cast each of these spells without expending a spell slot, but when you cast Spider Climb this way, you must target yourself, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast each spell in this way again. You can also cast either spell using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Your spellcasting ability for the spells is Wisdom.

description.p: Increase your Charisma by 1, to a maximum of 20.

sheet.description: Choose one level 1 spell from the Enchantment or Illusion school of magic. You always have that spell and the Spider Climb spell prepared. You can cast each of these spells without expending a spell slot, but when you cast Spider Climb this way, you must target yourself, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast each spell in this way again. You can also cast either spell using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Your spellcasting ability for the spells is Charisma.
